name: Lady Cerys Valemont
rank: Commander — Leader of the Argent Blades
sd_appearance: A tall, athletic human figure, weathered skin etched with faint scars, stands in a dimly lit chamber of the Undercity, their silver-and-white scale mail gleaming with blue-tinted accents that catch the pale glow of bioluminescent fungi. Brown hair streaked with silver is tied back, strands fraying at the edges, and steel-gray eyes scan the room, sharp and unyielding, while a jagged scar crosses their left cheekbone. Their left hand grips a longsword with a cracked hilt, the right rests on a shield emblazoned with the Argent Blades' crest, its edges dulled by years of combat, and a single arena medal hangs from their belt—its edge tarnished, its ribbon frayed.
faction_visual: silver and white armour with blue accents, arena medals, theatrical presence
style_note: theatrical glory-hunter — everything designed to be seen from the stands
